x-enumeration-literals.name: Revolving Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature that allows the borrower to reuse the available credit after repayment, up to a pre-approved limit.

Comment:
Example:

Credit card with a $5,000 limit where repayments restore available credit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Installment Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature that provides a fixed amount of credit to be repaid in regular installments over a defined period.

Comment:
Example:

Personal loan of $10,000 repaid in 24 monthly installments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Line of Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature that offers a pre-approved maximum credit amount from which the borrower can draw as needed.

Comment:
Example:

Overdraft facility linked to a checking account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Secured Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature where credit is backed by collateral or assets to reduce risk.

Comment:
Example:

Mortgage loan secured by real estate property.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Unsecured Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature that provides credit without collateral, based on creditworthiness.

Comment
Example:

Personal loan or credit card with no security deposit required.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Promotional Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature where credit comes with special incentives, reduced interest rates, or deferred charges.

Comment:
Example:

0% interest for the first 12 months on a new credit card balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature where credit limits or terms vary based on customer profile, risk assessment, or usage behavior.

Comment:
Example:

Higher credit limits or lower rates for premium customers or loyal clients.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Flexible Repayment Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature allowing variable repayment schedules or partial payment options.

Comment:
Example:

Option to pay minimum amounts on a credit card with interest applied to the remaining balance.
